signals.headline: Promoter accumulation during a 7.3% drawdown mirrors four prior recovery setups.
signals.summary: Promoter entities added on four of the last five material dips. The current drawdown is the fifth setup and matches a historical recovery pattern with an 80% win rate over 60 trading days.
reasoning_steps: Classified promoter activity from bulk deal records on NSE.
Compared event intensity against 24-month baseline — anomaly score 3.52σ.
Matched current drawdown with four prior dip-buy windows since 2022.
Computed 60-trading-day recovery outcomes: 4 wins, 0 losses.
Enriched with FII net flow context — neutral, not a headwind.
watch_items: Sector-wide IT risk sentiment from FII desks

signals.headline: FII selling pressure is rising while domestic support remains selective.
signals.summary: FII outflows accelerated for three consecutive sessions while DIIs bought only one of those days, creating a short-term imbalance. Historical data shows this cluster precedes a 3–7% mean-reversion window in 63% of cases.
reasoning_steps: Aggregated 3-day institutional flows from NSDL.
Compared current outflow magnitude with sector baseline — z-score 1.9.
Checked prior insurer drawdown contexts after similar flow clusters.
Identified a 63% mean-reversion win rate within 30 sessions.
watch_items: RBI policy commentary impact on insurance sector

signals.headline: Contribution-margin expansion and order-growth acceleration are aligning again.
signals.summary: Quarterly commentary shows margin improvement alongside order momentum, a combination that historically preceded positive re-rating windows in 75% of prior occurrences.
reasoning_steps: Parsed margin and order-growth language from the filing.
Scored commentary shift versus prior quarter — 2.2σ above baseline.
Back-tested similar inflection quarters since Zomato's listing in 2021.
75% of prior inflection quarters produced positive 30-day returns.

signals.headline: A single block trade of 1.2 million shares crossed the tape at a 2.1% discount — classic institutional accumulation.
signals.summary: Large block deals at discounts below 2.5% have historically been followed by consolidation or mild upside rather than selling pressure, based on 14 prior occurrences.
reasoning_steps: Detected bulk deal crossing 0.5% of market cap in single session.
Discount to market was 2.1% — within the institutional accumulation band.
Cross-referenced against 14 prior Reliance block deals since 2020.
71% resolved positively within 30 trading days.
watch_items: Jio subscriber additions in next quarter

signals.headline: AGM commentary signals cigarette volume growth revival and FMCG segment profitability improving faster than consensus expected.
signals.summary: Management language around FMCG profitability shifted materially positive at the AGM. Cross-referencing with four prior instances where similar language appeared before earnings, ITC beat consensus estimates 3 out of 4 times.
reasoning_steps: Extracted FMCG segment commentary from AGM transcript.
Scored sentiment shift versus prior two AGMs — 2.1σ above baseline.
Back-tested three prior instances of similar language shift.
ITC beat earnings estimates in 3 of 4 following quarters.

signals.headline: Tata Sons increased its consolidated Tata Steel stake by 0.94% via market purchase — a rare SAST-crossing accumulation event.
signals.summary: SAST Rule 29(2) disclosures of greater than 0.5% single-quarter accumulation have been followed by at least 8% upside in similar precedents across the Tata group over the past five years.
reasoning_steps: Detected SAST Rule 29(2) filing in the NSE corporate action feed.
Quantified accumulation at 0.94% — exceeds the 0.5% signal threshold.
Cross-referenced with five prior Tata group SAST-crossing events.
80% of prior events resolved with 8%+ upside within 45 trading days.

signals.headline: Promoter pledge release of 0.3% signals improved balance sheet confidence ahead of results.
signals.summary: HDFC Bank's promoter group released pledged shares ahead of the upcoming quarterly results cycle. Pledge releases preceding results have historically correlated with positive earnings surprises in banking stocks.
reasoning_steps: Detected pledge release in SEBI quarterly pledging disclosure.
Release amount: 0.3% of outstanding shares worth ~₹2,800 crore.
Cross-referenced pledge activity with 8 prior HDFCBANK results cycles.
Pledge releases within 30 days of results correlated with beats in 67% of cases.

signals.headline: FII net buyers in IT for 8 consecutive sessions — longest inflow streak since Q3 2024.
signals.summary: Eight-session consecutive FII buying in the IT sector is a rare event. Prior occurrences have been followed by an average 11.2% sector performance over 60 days in 5 out of 6 historical cases.
reasoning_steps: Aggregated daily FII sector-level flow for trailing 10 sessions.
Detected 8 consecutive positive days — 3.2σ above rolling mean.
Identified five prior instances of ≥7 consecutive positive FII days in IT.
5 out of 6 resolved positively at 30-day mark with avg 11.2% sector return.
watch_items: INR/USD rate trajectory impact on revenue hedging
TCS and Infosys management guidance tone in upcoming earnings

patterns.narrative: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average with expanding volume, confirming trend reversal strength. Historically this pattern has worked best when the Nifty is not already in a correction regime.
patterns.context: Current market breadth is neutral, which is closer to the successful historical cases than the failed ones. Financial services sector holding up better than broader indices.
risk_flags: Broader market weakness could override individual setup
Watch for NIM compression risk in next earnings

patterns.narrative: Volatility compression has resolved upward with confirming volume above the 20-day average. Similar breakouts from Bollinger squeezes have trended for three to five weeks in Reliance's history.
patterns.context: Energy and telecom leadership both improved into the breakout, providing dual business tailwinds.

patterns.narrative: Price is retesting a prior multi-session support base while buyers have stepped in on above-average volume, confirming the floor is holding.
patterns.context: The setup is constructive but remains more sensitive to index weakness than the large-cap banking leaders. EV transition volume pickup is the key fundamental catalyst to watch.

patterns.narrative: After a smooth 8-week cup formation, a tight 2-week handle consolidation completed with a volume-backed breakout above ₹248. Classic cup magnitude target projects towards ₹290.
patterns.context: Breakout coincides with improving quick-commerce margin narrative. Consumer internet sector breadth is constructive.
risk_flags: Relatively short listing history limits back-test robustness
High short-term IV means options premiums are expensive

patterns.narrative: A sharp 12% rally over 6 sessions was followed by a tight 10-day sideways consolidation on declining volume — a textbook bull flag. Volume surged 2.3x on the breakout session.
patterns.context: The flag pole started from the point of the promoter accumulation disclosure, suggesting institutional validation of the signal. IT peers also held up during the consolidation.
risk_flags: Broad IT sector correction would override the setup

patterns.narrative: ITC tested the ₹415 level twice within a 3-week span with the second test showing lower volume — a classic double bottom confirmation. Neckline resistance at ₹438 was broken with above-average volume.
patterns.context: FMCG sector breadth improved in the week of the breakout. Cigarette excise overhang has partially receded following budget clarity.
risk_flags: Volume on neckline break was only 1.4x average — ideally above 1.5x
Excise duty risk in supplementary budget

patterns.narrative: A textbook inverse H&S formed over 14 weeks with the head at ₹138, shoulders roughly symmetric at ₹152–154. Neckline at ₹168 was cleared on volume 2.1x the 30-day average.
patterns.context: China steel production cuts have improved export opportunity. The SAST filing signal adds a fundamental overlay to this technical setup.

daily_video.title: Daily Market Wrap — March 23, 2026
daily_video.summary: Nifty closed marginally higher, banks stabilized, IT stayed selective, and a promoter-accumulation alert in Persistent Systems led the AI radar.

arcs.thesis: How FII positioning in Indian IT went from a year of outflows to the strongest consecutive inflow streak since Q3 2024.

Infosys FY26 guidance beats consensus — triggers sector re-rating

Aether Mobility IPO oversubscribed 12.4x — GMP at ₹118
Prism Diagnostics IPO open — subscription tracking 5.8x on Day 2

ipos.name: Aether Mobility Limited
ipos.summary: Asset-light EV components player with healthy export mix and strong order book. Pricing leaves less room for execution misses but institutional demand is strong at 15x in QIB category.

ipos.name: Prism Diagnostics
ipos.summary: Pan-India diagnostics chain with improving ROCE (19.2%) and regional density in Tier 2 cities. Revenue growth of 28% YoY balanced by slower cash conversion cycle.

ipos.name: NexGen Fintech Solutions
ipos.summary: B2B payments infrastructure play with 3 major PSU bank partnerships. Relatively asset-light model with high NRR of 142%. Some key-man concentration risk.

ipos.name: BharatSemi Technologies
ipos.summary: Semiconductor design services company targeting automotive and industrial IoT. Beneficiary of India semiconductor PLI scheme. Higher valuation requires strong execution delivery.
